headline: Morgan Stanley Reiterates Buy Rating on Devon Energy (DVN) Stock
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. On June 12, Morgan Stanley analyst Devin McDermott reiterated a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock, setting a price objective of $66.00. The analyst’s rating is backed by factors that are related to Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN)’s merger integration and strategic positioning. The management […]
